TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Majia Nsgan Majia o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 61.68 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 11.05 km², dxgal pmblxan o 49.62 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 6,757, sapah o 2,029, seejiq tnpusu 6,507 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 96%(Paywang, Rukay). Paywang, Rukay ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Majia o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Paljur , Zayazayan , Vecekadan , Laulauzan , Payuwan , Kazangiljan , Wakaba , Masilid , Makazayazaya , Tjanavakung . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: maɟia nsgan maɟia o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o **.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pajwaŋ, ɾukaj). pajwaŋ, ɾukaj ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan maɟia o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, palɟuɾ , *aja*ajan , *əʦəkadan , laulau*an , pajuwan , ka*aŋilɟan , wakaba , masilid , maka*aja*aja , tɟana*akuŋ . pusupnjaħan patas
